creator: yushunwa@isi.edu
text:
Hi,
 
 	Just wondering if these patches are committed into the
 	distribution yet.
 
 	I've seen similar problems in FreeBSD 4.1.1 where I specified
 	"pseudo-device gif 32" and then portmap didn't work correctly
 	on Libretto 110CT. portmap appeared to be running, but nothing
 	(amd, ypbind, etc) can register with it. If I comment out the
 	gif line and recompile the kernel, everything worked again. 
 
 	I think it's a serious problem especially for laptops where the
 	NIC got attached after all the pseudo interfaces. You probably
 	won't see this often on desktops.
 
 	It's probably too late to get these patches into 4.2, but I was
 	just wondering if anyone is actaully looking into this since
 	there were no updates since July.
 
 	Thanks,
 
 	yushun.
 
 ____________________________________________________________________________
 Yu-Shun Wang <yushunwa@isi.edu>               Information Sciences Institute
                                            University of Southern California
